name: Improper Control of Dynamically-Identified Variables
description: The product does not properly restrict reading from or writing to dynamically-identified variables specified by input strings. Languages offering dynamic variable access allow attackers to modify unintended variables with security implications when input is not properly validated.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a string that is used as a variable name in a TRANSFORM[dynamic_variable] node (extract, register_globals, variable variables) to read or write STORAGE nodes without a CONTROL[allowlist] restricting which variables can be accessed
